name: Ovulation Calculator
seo_description: Use our free ovulation calculator to quickly estimate ovulation, fertile_start based on lmp, cycle. Not registration needed.
result_context: The ovulation occurs ~14 days before of the próximo period; the ventana fértil includes 5 days antes.
formula_display: Ovulación = last menstruación + (days cycle - 14); Ventana fértil = ovulation ± 5 days
steps: The calculador apply the formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: Not verifying that lmp are in correct units before Calculate
Redondear values intermediums before of the calculation final (pierde precision)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condition is special
desc: Free online ovulation calculator. Enter last menstrual period and cycle length to get instant results.
